title: Prototype to collect vineyard pre-pruning biomass
description: A practice abstract describing an innovative prototype for vineyard pre-pruning biomass collection that integrates pruning operations with on-site biomass size reduction and storage for later valorization. Field trials demonstrated 75% collection efficiency at an average speed of 1.15 ha/h, yielding biomass with 45% moisture content and 205 kg/m3 bulk density.
